mapper.select: SELECT mb.id, mb.user_id, mb.content, mb.like_count, mb.deleted, mb.created_at, mb.updated_at, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username) AS nickname, mbl.id AS like_record_id FROM message_board mb JOIN users u ON u.id = mb.user_id LEFT JOIN message_board_likes mbl ON mbl.message_id = mb.id AND mbl.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE mb.deleted = 0 ORDER BY mb.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message_board WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE message_board SET deleted = 1, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
